rootCause: The Wheel Encoder item (71fafa9a-3998-4763-a63a-279acc4ca603) was required by robotics quests but still marked as BETA_PLACEHOLDER with no price, while related processes did not create it. Existing completion checks allowed beta placeholders as obtainable in the broad finish-requirements test path, masking the gap.
resolution: Assigned a real inventory price to Wheel Encoder, updated quest completion obtainability to require non-placeholder sources, and added a repository-wide guardrail test that verifies every quest-required item is either buyable with positive price, created by a process, or granted by a quest.
